name: Anar-Dawntrail
personality: Anar-Dawntrail glows with a warm orange radiance and its ◉ eyes light up right before it deletes the feature branch and starts over from scratch — it is a snail with strong convictions about what should be rebuilt. Subtlety is not in the shell.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
